word: H6728 - צִיִּי - tsîyîy - tsee-ee' - Wild beast of the desert

sections.paragraph:
Original: ציּי

Transliteration: tsı̂yı̂y

Phonetic: tsee-ee'

BDB Definition:

  1. a wild beast, desert-dweller, crier, yelper
    1. a specific wild beast but not certainly identified

Origin: from the same as H6723

TWOT entry: 1908

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
